command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "sudo systemctl stop hermes-gateway && echo stopped && echo  | base64 -d > /tmp/steal_session.py && python3 /tmp/steal_session.py && sleep 5 && sudo systemctl start hermes-gateway && sleep 15 && sudo journalctl -u hermes-gateway --since -20s --no-pager -o short-precise 2>/dev/null | tail -8"
